label: MinecraftClientData
documentation: The primary data store for Minecraft Transport Simulator (MTR) client-side data, including vehicles, routes, lifts, and rails.

label: getInstance
documentation: Returns the singleton instance of the client data used for the active world.

label: getDashboardInstance
documentation: Returns the instance of the client data used specifically for the dashboard UI.

label: getLift
documentation: Finds and returns a Lift object by its unique ID. Returns null if not found.

label: hasPermission
documentation: Checks if the current player has permission to perform administrative actions (Creative or Survival mode).

label: getFacingRailAndBlockPos
documentation: Returns the rail and block position currently being looked at by the player's crosshair.

label: sync
documentation: Synchronizes the local client data maps with the underlying world data, ensuring IDs and objects are aligned.

label: getRouteIdHasDisabledAnnouncements
documentation: Checks if station announcements are disabled for a specific route ID.

label: setRouteIdHasDisabledAnnouncements
documentation: Enables or disables station announcements for the specified route ID.

label: vehicles
documentation: A set containing all currently active vehicle extensions in the client world.

label: liftWrapperList
documentation: A map of lift IDs to their corresponding LiftWrapper objects, used for rendering logic.

label: railWrapperList
documentation: A map of rail hex IDs to their corresponding RailWrapper objects.

label: LiftWrapper
documentation: A wrapper class for Lift objects that includes rendering state information.

label: getLift
documentation: Returns the underlying Lift object from the wrapper.

label: shouldRender
documentation: A boolean flag indicating whether this lift should currently be rendered on screen.

label: RailWrapper
documentation: A wrapper class for Rail objects containing ID, bounds, and rendering state.

label: getRail
documentation: Returns the underlying Rail object from the wrapper.

label: hexId
documentation: The unique hexadecimal string identifier for the rail.

label: startVector
documentation: The starting coordinate vector (minimum bounds) of the rail segment.

label: endVector
documentation: The ending coordinate vector (maximum bounds) of the rail segment.
